overview.title: Education & Training Programs
overview.description: ECAA's Education & Training programs support children, youth, parents, families, and the broader community through practical learning, awareness, prevention, wellness, and leadership development.
overview.subtext: Program dates, session details, eligibility, and registration information will be announced as they become available.

mainPrograms.title: Throb of Our Hearts
mainPrograms.subtitle: Yelbachne Terta
mainPrograms.description: Support, education, and community awareness for special needs children and their families.
mainPrograms.shortDescription: Support, education, and community awareness for special needs children and their families.
placeholderDetails: Program details will be announced soon.
Family support resources and session information will be shared when available.
Contact ECAA for current information.

detailSections.heading: About This Program
detailSections.body: The Throb of Our Hearts program supports children and families with special needs through community awareness, education, family connection, and shared support.

detailSections.heading: Family and Community Support
detailSections.body: This page can be used to share support information, parent resources, awareness sessions, meeting updates, and community announcements.

detailSections.heading: Future Updates
detailSections.body: ECAA editors will be able to add flyers, photos, videos, forms, and helpful links to this page through the admin portal.

mediaItems.title: The Throb of Our Hearts Flyer
mediaItems.caption: Community awareness and family support flyer for children and families with special needs.
mediaItems.altText: Flyer for ECAA The Throb of Our Hearts special needs children and family program.

mainPrograms.registrationEmptyMessage: Registration or contact information for this program will be shared when available.

detailSections.heading: Student Support
detailSections.body: This program supports students and families through academic preparation, college readiness, mentorship, and educational guidance.

detailSections.heading: College Readiness
detailSections.body: Future content may include college preparation resources, application guidance, scholarship information, mentorship opportunities, and student workshops.

detailSections.heading: Summer School and Youth Programs
detailSections.body: ECAA may share youth program applications, summer school opportunities, student interest forms, and education-related announcements on this page.

resourceLinks.label: Student Interest Form
resourceLinks.description: Submit student information for ECAA youth and education programs, including grade level, school information, and parent or guardian contact details.

resourceLinks.label: Summer School Application Form
resourceLinks.description: Application form for Ethiopian Community Summer School. The current form mentions summer school dates, registration information, and payment instructions. ECAA should verify current dates, fees, and registration deadlines before each program season.

registrationLinks.title: Summer School Application Form
registrationLinks.description: Application form for Ethiopian Community Summer School. The current form mentions summer school dates, registration information, and payment instructions. ECAA should verify current dates, fees, and registration deadlines before each program season.
registrationLinks.note: Please review the form carefully for current dates, deadlines, fees, and instructions.

closingCta.title: Have questions about ECAA programs?

categories.title: Community Support
categories.description: ECAA helps newcomers and immigrant families connect with information, resources, orientation support, and community networks as they build life in the Atlanta area.

categories.title: Cultural Programs
categories.description: ECAA supports Ethiopian cultural connection through gatherings, celebrations, language, heritage, and intergenerational community activities.

categories.title: Youth & Education
categories.description: ECAA supports youth through education programs, college readiness, mentorship, student interest forms, and activities that help young people grow with confidence and cultural pride.

form.title: Student Interest Form
form.description: Submit student interest information for ECAA youth and education programs.

categories.title: Health & Wellness
categories.description: ECAA supports health, wellness, sports, and social activities that encourage community well-being, fitness, and connection across generations.

categories.title: EDIR
categories.description: EDIR is an important mutual-support structure within the Ethiopian community. ECAA includes EDIR-related leadership and governance as part of its broader community service structure.

categories.title: Volunteer & Civic Engagement
categories.description: Community members can support ECAA through volunteering in youth programs, event planning, IT, grants, newcomer support, legal awareness, health education, financial literacy, and community services.
categories.imageAlt: Volunteer and civic engagement placeholder image.

form.title: Volunteer Information Form
form.description: Share your volunteer interest and availability to support ECAA programs, events, and community services.
